properties.description: Unique identifier for daily aggregated risk record.
properties.business_rules: Must be unique, Cannot be null, Format: DRISK_{date}
properties.business_description: Unique identifier for each daily risk snapshot, enabling time-series analysis of organizational compliance risk trends.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for null values, Validate uniqueness, Ensure daily records exist
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range, Filter by specific date

properties.description: Date of the aggregated risk assessment.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be a valid date, Should be updated daily
properties.business_description: Reference date for the daily snapshot, critical for trend analysis and historical comparison of compliance risk metrics.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure not in future, Validate date format, Check for missing dates in sequence
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range, Filter by specific month/year, Filter by day of week
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by date, GROUP BY month, GROUP BY quarter

properties.description: Total number of active users with compliance training assignments.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be > 0
properties.business_description: Denominator for compliance rate calculations, representing the total population under compliance monitoring.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure positive values, Compare with User_csod active count, Check for unusual fluctuations
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range

properties.description: Total number of compliance training assignments.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be > 0
properties.business_description: Total volume of compliance obligations, indicating organizational training burden and compliance complexity.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure positive values, Validate against source tables, Check for unusual spikes
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range

properties.description: Average composite risk score across all user-training combinations.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100
properties.business_description: Primary KPI for organizational compliance health, indicating overall risk exposure across the enterprise.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range 0-100, Check for logical consistency with risk distribution, Monitor for significant changes
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range, Compare to previous periods

properties.description: Median composite risk score, less sensitive to outliers than average.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100
properties.business_description: Robust central tendency measure for risk distribution, providing a more stable view of typical risk levels unaffected by extreme cases.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range 0-100, Compare with avgRiskScore for skew detection
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range, Compare to average for distribution insight

properties.description: Highest risk score recorded for the day.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100, Should be >= avgRiskScore
properties.business_description: Identifies the most critical compliance risk requiring immediate attention, serving as an early warning indicator.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range 0-100, Ensure >= avgRiskScore, Flag if consistently 100
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range, Filter by threshold (>90)

properties.description: Number of assignments with Critical risk category (75-100).
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be >= 0, Must be <= totalAssignments
properties.business_description: Volume of most severe compliance risks requiring immediate executive attention and intervention.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure non-negative, Validate <= totalAssignments, Monitor for spikes
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range, Filter by non-zero values
properties.aggregation_suggestions: SUM, AVERAGE, TREND, PERCENTAGE of total

properties.description: Number of assignments with High risk category (50-75).
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be >= 0, Must be <= totalAssignments
properties.business_description: Volume of elevated compliance risks requiring proactive management and monitoring.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure non-negative, Validate <= totalAssignments, Check distribution
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range

properties.description: Number of assignments with Moderate risk category (25-50).
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be >= 0, Must be <= totalAssignments
properties.business_description: Volume of medium-priority compliance risks requiring standard monitoring and periodic follow-up.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure non-negative, Validate <= totalAssignments
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range

properties.description: Number of assignments with Low risk category (0-25).
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be >= 0, Must be <= totalAssignments
properties.business_description: Volume of low-priority compliance activities with minimal risk of non-completion.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure non-negative, Validate <= totalAssignments
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range

properties.description: Average severity of consequences across all assignments.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100
properties.business_description: Indicates the average potential organizational impact if compliance obligations are not met, guiding resource prioritization.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range 0-100, Check consistency with risk distribution
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range

properties.description: Average probability of non-completion across all assignments.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100
properties.business_description: Indicates overall probability of compliance failures, reflecting organizational engagement and training culture effectiveness.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range 0-100, Monitor for trends
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range

properties.description: Number of assignments currently overdue.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be >= 0, Must be <= totalAssignments
properties.business_description: Critical metric indicating current compliance violations requiring immediate remediation and reporting to stakeholders.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure non-negative, Validate <= totalAssignments, Alert on increases
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range, Filter by non-zero
properties.aggregation_suggestions: SUM, AVERAGE, TREND, PERCENTAGE of total

properties.description: Number of assignments due within the next 7 days.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be >= 0, Must be <= totalAssignments
properties.business_description: Near-term compliance deadline pressure indicator, enabling proactive intervention before items become overdue.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure non-negative, Validate <= totalAssignments
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range, Filter by high values

properties.description: Number of assignments due within the next 14 days.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be >= 0, Must be <= totalAssignments, Should be >= dueSoon7Days
properties.business_description: Medium-term workload indicator for planning manager interventions and training session scheduling.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure non-negative, Validate >= dueSoon7Days, Validate <= totalAssignments
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range

properties.description: Number of assignments due within the next 30 days.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be >= 0, Must be <= totalAssignments, Should be >= dueSoon14Days
properties.business_description: Monthly pipeline visibility for resource planning and capacity management of compliance training programs.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure non-negative, Validate >= dueSoon14Days, Validate <= totalAssignments
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range

properties.description: Number of assignments requiring manager escalation.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be >= 0, Must be <= totalAssignments
properties.business_description: Action queue size for management intervention, indicating volume of high-risk situations requiring immediate attention.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure non-negative, Validate <= totalAssignments, Alert on spikes
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range, Filter by non-zero
properties.aggregation_suggestions: SUM, AVERAGE, TREND, PERCENTAGE of total

properties.description: Percentage of completed compliance assignments (0-100).
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100
properties.business_description: Primary compliance performance KPI, indicating overall organizational effectiveness in meeting training obligations.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range 0-100, Check for data quality issues if extreme values
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range, Compare to target (e.g., 90%)

properties.description: Average time taken to complete assignments (in days).
properties.business_rules: Can be null if no completions, Must be positive
properties.business_description: Efficiency metric indicating organizational compliance velocity and training program effectiveness.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure positive values, Flag outliers (>180 days)
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range

properties.description: Overall risk trend compared to previous day.
properties.business_rules: Can be null for first record, Valid values: 'Increasing', 'Decreasing', 'Stable'
properties.business_description: Day-over-day risk direction indicator, providing early warning of deteriorating compliance health or validation of improvement initiatives.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate against allowed values, Ensure based on previous day comparison
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by Increasing, Filter by date range

properties.description: Percentage change in average risk score from previous day.
properties.business_rules: Can be null for first record, Positive indicates increasing risk
properties.business_description: Quantifies the magnitude of risk changes, enabling threshold-based alerting and trend analysis for compliance oversight.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate reasonable range (-50 to 50), Flag extreme changes
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by significant changes (>5%), Filter by date range

properties.description: TIME SERIES Gold layer table containing daily aggregated compliance risk metrics providing enterprise-wide visibility into organizational compliance health and trends. Sample data includes 50 daily records (Oct 28 - Dec 16, 2024) aggregated from 100 user-activity assignments per day.
properties.business_purpose: Enables executive dashboards, daily compliance scorecards, trend analysis, and real-time monitoring of compliance risk exposure. Provides day-over-day comparisons, moving averages, and early warning trend detection across the enterprise.
properties.data_lineage: Aggregated from ComplianceRisk_Silver time series table with daily refresh. Each record aggregates approximately 100 user-activity assessments using: AVG/MEDIAN/MAX for risk scores, COUNT by risk category, SUM for overdue/escalation counts, and calculated completion rates. Includes day-over-day trend calculations (Increasing/Decreasing/Stable) and percentage changes for momentum tracking.
properties.data_retention: Data retained for 3 years for long-term trend analysis and regulatory reporting.
properties.key_relationships: Aggregates from ComplianceRisk_Silver (time series), rolled up to Weekly and Monthly gold tables for longer-term trends
properties.queryPatterns: ["Filter by assessmentDate for daily trend analysis", "Calculate aggregate risk metrics (avgRiskScore, totalHighRiskAssignments)", "Filter by riskLevel for executive dashboards", "Group by division or position for organizational risk reporting", "Calculate day-over-day trend direction and percentage changes", "Use 7-day and 30-day moving averages for trend analysis", "Filter by escalationCount to find days with high escalation activity", "Calculate completion rates (completedAssignments/totalAssignments)"]
properties.useCases: ["Executive Dashboards: Provide daily aggregated compliance risk metrics for leadership", "Compliance Scorecards: Generate daily organizational compliance risk summaries", "Trend Analysis: Track organizational risk trends over time using temporal analysis", "Risk Reporting: Monitor aggregate risk metrics by division and position", "Strategic Planning: Use aggregated data for compliance risk management strategies", "Real-time Monitoring: Track organizational compliance risk exposure daily", "Performance Tracking: Measure effectiveness of compliance interventions", "Seasonality Detection: Identify patterns and seasonality in compliance risk"]

properties.displayName: Daily Aggregates to Source Assessments Relationship
properties.description: Each daily summary aggregates all user-activity risk assessments for that date

properties.displayName: Daily Aggregates to Monthly Rollup Relationship
properties.description: Daily summaries are rolled up into monthly strategic reports
